changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "The Elderly Leader of the Sonozaki Family?"

TextENGNew: "Yes. The postal worker hasn't seen her either. ...Apparently, the Sonozaki main house keeps a seal hanging from their mailbox, so anyone delivering registered mail or packages can just stamp it themselves and drop it in."
"Na-ha-ha, that's rather careless. ...So when was the last time anyone saw her?"
"Her greeting at the Watanagashi opening ceremony. She apparently went straight home after that."
"Well, she is getting on in years. ...From what I hear, she goes out several times a week for lessons.@k@vS20/11/440700156.Any luck on that front?"
"Every Monday she attends taishougoto lessons at the assembly hall, but she didn't show up this week."
"Any calls saying she wouldn't be coming? Did anyone follow up?"
"No, nobody. She apparently skips from time to time, so no one thought anything of it."
"Tomorrow around ten, let's call and pretend we're from the town hall. See if you can confirm whether she's home."
"Ten o'clock. Got it!"
Ever since the involvement of Hinamizawa's old customs began to seem increasingly likely, he had been quietly keeping the Three Families under surveillance.
By now, the head of the Kimiyoshi family and the head of the Furude family had both vanished.
Only one family head remained.
Oryou Sonozaki, head of the Sonozaki family.
She was said to be a woman of advanced age.
Though her authority had not diminished, she rarely appeared in public, making it difficult to confirm her whereabouts.
...This last remaining family head had not been seen by anyone since the day of Watanagashi.
Was she still alive and well within the Sonozaki main house?@k...Or was she already...?
"According to Mion Sonozaki, she's been feeling unwell and is resting in bed."
"I wonder if she's really just resting. I'd like to see her face -- and check her pulse..."
"............My thoughts exactly."
The two of them exhaled long plumes of cigarette smoke...
"Ooishi-san... the search warrants for the Sonozaki main house and Furude Shrine. Do you think we have any chance of getting them?"
Ooishi gave no reply, simply exhaling another cloud of smoke, literally shrouding himself in a haze...
